title: Jaques of London Wobbly Pirates Toy | Stacking Wooden Toys for 3 4 5 year olds | Toddler Toys Balancing Games | Since 1795...
features: Sail and Stacking Toys | Jaques Wooden Pirate Balancing Board playset is a game that can be enjoyed by everyone, including toddlers aged 3 and up. Great for solo play or fun for the whole family. Roll the dice to discover which item to select, stack it, and see if it is balanced enough to withstand the wobbly waves of the sea. The last to add a character before everything tumbles wins
Sustainable Wood | All of our stacking wooden toys are crafted using the highest quality FSC-approved wood for safe, sustainable play. Good for your child and the environment.

Pirate Toys | Our wobbly pirate design assists toddlers aged 3 and up with the development of fine motor skills, encouraging little ones to learn critical thinking and problem-solving through challenges and experimental play. A fantastic new addition to our ever-growing collection of Montessori toys for 3 and 4 year olds.

Vibrant and Colourful | Our beautifully crafted Pirate ship and pals are decorated using the highest quality water-based paints, making them a good gift from parents & grandparents of both boys and girls aged 3, 4, and 5. All our toys deliver a radiant and reliable playtime experience.
227 Years of Wooden Toys | Our pirate ship toys for kids come with the reassurance of more than 227 years experience, directly from the world’s oldest toys and games manufacturer, Jaques of London.

specifications_table.Included Components: 1 wooden pirate ship | 2 stablising blocks | 12 pirate charactures | 1 dice
